query: SELECT id, title, HEX(SUBSTRING(sheetMusicAbc, 1, 50)) as hex_preview, LOCATE('\n', sheetMusicAbc) as first_newline, LOCATE(';', sheetMusicAbc) as first_semicolon FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id
